title: Senior Designer
description:
JOB HIGHLIGHTS

  • Be part of a reputable company
  • Medical, dental, health screening benefit and birthday gift
  • Good career growth, good learning & development opportunities

DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Leading, mentoring, and developing an architectural team
  • Create conceptual and schematic design and detail working drawings
  • Create and oversee general design development and project direction
  • Preparation of specifications and tender documentation
  • Plan and supervise authority submission requirements and procedure for projects
  • Coordinate with technical consultants
  • Oversee project contract execution and on-site supervision

JOB COMPETENCY (QUALIFICATION, EXPERIENCE & KNOWLEDGE)

  • A recognized Degree in Architecture, preferably registered with the Board of Architects, Singapore
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant architectural work experience and at least 5 years of architectural work in Design.
  • Good knowledge of architectural details, working drawings and construction practices
  • Strong knowledge and understanding of project, material, and cost management.
  • Proven knowledge in carpentry construction & technical detail drawings.
  • Excellent in design presentation and human relation skill.
  • Good team leader
  • Conversant with local codes and regulations
  • Autodesk, 3D modelling (SketchUp), and preferably BIM project implementation experience with in-depth knowledge of REVIT architecture
  • Must have contract administration experience and able to Coordinate

postedCompany.description:
With a track record of more than 40 years in the industry, ONG&ONG has earned an unparalleled reputation for servicing our clients with creativity, excellence and commitment.

 

ONG&ONG offers a complete 360º solution – i.e. a parceled cross-discipline integrated solution, encompassing all aspects of the construction business. This three-pronged solution encompasses design (architecture, urban planning, interior, landscape, environmental branding, lighting and experience design), engineering (mechanical, electrical, civil, structural, fire safety and environmental) and management (project, development, construction, cost and place).

 

We are an ISO14001 certified practice with offices in Singapore, China, Vietnam, India, Malaysia, the USA, Indonesia, Mongolia and the UAE. In-depth knowledge of the local context, culture and regulations allow us to better understand our clients' needs to enable us to meet and exceed their expectations. With more than a hundred awards to our name, ONG&ONG constantly works towards staying ahead of the competition.
postedCompany.name: ONG & ONG PTE. LTD.
